attacking_style: Attacks on penultimate climbs rather than final ascents, showing aggressive intent but often lacks the explosive power to capitalize fully or contest the stage win.
team_tactics: Movistar deploys him flexibly—willing to sacrifice his own opportunities to pull aggressively for designated team leaders, even when both are in breakaways with GC ambitions.
terrain_preference: Multi-climb mountain stages with sustained high-altitude efforts (e.g., Paso San Valentino). Struggles when explosive accelerations or final climb firepower are required.
vulnerability: Lacks finishing speed after prolonged efforts; can position well through penultimate climbs but fades when catching moves or contesting stage finishes after aggressive riding.
key_patterns: Attacks on penultimate climbs, not final ascents (2023 Dauphiné, positioning pattern)
Strong domestique instincts override personal ambition; pulls hard for teammates despite own GC potential (2019 Giro)
Survives brutal high-mountain selections but lacks punch to animate or win late (2021 Giro, 2023 Dauphiné)
form_trajectory: neutral: Recent 2023 observation shows aggressive intent intact but declining ability to convert efforts into results or bridge gaps
